creator: tjones@nfinity.com
text:
When I boot from a my harddisk I get a sio1 not found at 0x2f8, but when I boot from a floppy, The serial port is enabled.
Sio contains my modem.  It is not in conflict with anything and show up fine in dos.  I have a quantum hardrive and use the
masterboot record to start the driver to detect the actual size of the 
drive since my cmos does not support it.  I have a 386/33 machine.
